The Quran states in multiple verses (e.g., 51:49, 36:36) that Allah created everything in pairs, which is interpreted to mean opposite types or complementary counterparts. This duality extends beyond male and female to include night and day, life and death, positive/negative charges, and things beyond human knowledge.
